content.en:
"Three Thousand Ancient Eras!"

This time is still relatively long for Ye Tian.

He plans to use this time to improve his strength so that he can face the Eternal Genius Match.

Although it is not possible to get the top 10, so as to get the unknown big opportunity.

However, it would be quite good to be able to get a good ranking and get some more source stones from the other side!

"My Winter Yuan Lord Horse Armor is also a genius on the other side, Jun Zu should also let me participate in the Eternal Genius Competition, right?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Sure enough.

It didn't take long.

Jun Zu found Ye Tian's Winter Yuan Lord Vest.

"Master!"

Ye Tian's vest shouted respectfully.

"Dongyun, the Eternal Genius Tournament in the Taichao Domain is about to start, I am going to let you go over and participate, not to ask for many rankings, but to meet other Other-level geniuses and increase your knowledge. Jun Zu said.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tianying said.

......

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian began to make every effort to improve his strength.

For him, there is no need to improve his cultivation, because in the Eternal Genius Competition, the cultivation of all the contestants is the same, and they will all be maintained at a cultivation level with the blessing of some kind of treasure.

Therefore, there is no point in improving one's cultivation.

Well, there are only three aspects left to lift.

The first is to create more supernatural powers on the other side, the second is to create more magic on the other side, and the third is to make more body parts of the other side gold.

"The technique of the other side cannot directly improve combat effectiveness, but can only play an auxiliary role. I've created enough of the other side, and there's no need to create it. Then create the magic of the other side and the golden body of the other side!"

In particular, the golden embodiment on the other side helped him the most.

If he could turn his whole body into a golden body on the other side, then his strength would increase to a very terrifying level.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Ye Tian sacrificed countless copies of his body, constantly researching the method of creating the golden body on the other side, and turning the golden body on the other side of the body little by little.

Before you know it, the three thousand primeval years are about to pass.

"One-third of the body has completed the golden body on the other side!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

His current level of golden embodiment on the other side is almost the same as that of the original Lord of Silence.

And at the beginning, the Lord of Silence was only an primeval-level genius, relying on one-third of the golden embodiment of the other side and some other side techniques, he could hold on to the other side level genius True Extreme Lord for a long time.

It is conceivable that he is not only a genius at the other side, but also has completed the golden body of the other side, how terrifying his strength will be.

In addition to one-third of his body completing the golden body transformation of the other side, he also created two other supernatural powers.

One is the supernatural technique of the other side of the body method, called the Cave Extreme Escape Method, and the other is the supernatural power of the other side of the domain class - the other side of the void domain!

These two supernatural techniques on the other side, Ye Tian is ready to use them for the real body to copy the body, and will not use them for the vest of the Lord of Dong Yuan.

After all, no matter how powerful the vest is, no matter how many opportunities you get, your cultivation will be improved, and your strength will increase, and there will be no way to feed back to the real body to copy the body!

Therefore, it is naturally the best choice to replicate the body of the real body.

In case it really makes it to the top ten, then the real body replicating the body to get a great opportunity is the maximum benefit.

......

Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Eternal Zero notified Ye Tian to come over.

Ye Tian soon came to the Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Lord of Eternal Zero!"

Ye Tian shouted.

The Lord of Eternal Zero nodded, and then said, "It's almost time, I'll take you to the Taichao Domain!"

Immediately.

A statue of a large golden bird emerges from the hand of the Lord of Eternal Zero.

In an instant, this golden bird statue seemed to come to life and turned into a terrifying golden bird, exuding a terrifying aura.

But Ye Tian felt the aura of the divine soldier on the other side from this golden bird.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, this is a high-level mimicry god on the other side, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Well, it's indeed a high-level mimic divine weapon!" The Lord of Eternal Zero nodded: "This kind of mimic divine weapon on the other side is several times more valuable than a high-level divine soldier on the other side, or even ten times higher, it is very rare, without a certain amount of cultivation, even if it is a high-level divine weapon caster, it can't be created." "

Ye Tian nodded.

He is now a high-level Divine Weapon Forger on the other side, but he can't create such a high-level mimic Divine Soldier on the other side.

This kind of high-level mimicry can be transformed into weapons of various shapes, and can also be transformed into various creatures to fight, and it itself contains a very terrifying attack power, which does not need to be deliberately controlled by the owner.

For example, the Lord of Eternal Zero, after activating this high-level mimic divine weapon on the other side, it can turn into a golden bird and fly, serving as a tool for hurrying.

Wow!

The big golden bird shuttled at breakneck speed, and the Lord of Eternal Zero sat there, not needing to do anything.

Soon.

The golden bird leapt to the rivers of the Blood Yan Domain and the Ice Pole Domain.

There are a lot of worlds hidden in the domain river, as well as some strange creatures.

But.

The aura of the big golden bird was terrifying, so no creature dared to attack.

"This is the Domain River, and every region has a Domain River, and it is divided into regions according to the Domain River, the land of eternity. The Blood Yan Domain where our Gu Heng Mountain is located is a medium area, not as good as the Taichao Domain. The Taichao Domain is a relatively high-level area, and its strength is very strong. For example, in the Holy Mountain on the other side of the Taichao Domain, the strength of one family can beat the entire Blood Yan Domain!" the Lord of Eternal Zero introduced.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded and listened carefully.

As time passed, the big golden bird crossed one area after another.

After a long time, they finally arrived in the Taichao Domain.

As soon as he arrived in the Taichao Domain, an unimaginable terrifying giant emerged from the Domain River, and its body seemed to be larger than the entire Ancient Heng Mountain.

When Ye Tian and the Lord of Eternal Zero crossed the Domain River, the giant looked over, but did not attack.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, what is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Eternal Zero introduced: "These are a kind of creatures in captivity in the Holy Mountain on the other side-the Taichao Giant, the strength of the Taichao Giant is very strong, about comparable to the primeval-level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm. The Chaos Giant has a very special ability, that is, it can perceive any kind of creature that crosses the river, analyze its information, and transmit it to the holy mountain on the other side. Therefore, any powerhouse who comes to the Taichao Domain, the information will be known by the Holy Mountain on the other side first. "

"A strong person like you, the Lord of Eternal Zero, can the Chaos Giants sense it?" Ye Tian was surprised.

"I can perceive it!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero, "The Chaos Giants mobilize the power of the Domain River, so even I can't evade their perception. "
